text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to become a true partyer, Mejiro Palmer
heads out into town with Daitaku Helios. She
learns that feels are what determine how much
fun life is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of Mejiro Palmer's flashy lifestyle reaches
the Mejiro estate. However, Grandmother Mejiro
decides to watch over her without interfering.
